description: Style NoteThis easy-to-wear T-shirt from spykar adds a bold brassy look to your wardrobe. Show off your urban style in this fashionably tailored piece and revel in the comfort of the soft fabric. Pair this versatile tee with dark denims and casual shoes.Product DetailsGreen T-shirt with a ribbed V-neck, foldable short sleeves with mid arm button tabs and ribbed cuffs, printed branding on the left chest and a ribbed hem Material and Care86% cotton and 14% nylon Hand wash in cold water with mild detergentDo not soak, wring or twistDry in shadeFold and stack to maintain shapeModerate warm iron; Do not iron on print or embroiderySize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
